name: Check Transaction Status from Hash Only
query: Did this transaction succeed on Radius testnet? 0xaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
context: User only has a transaction hash and wants a simple yes/no plus a link.
expected_behavior: Chooses a valid general-tooling path (cast, web3.py, or viem)
Calls transaction receipt endpoint via tooling
Handles both confirmed and pending cases
Reports status clearly (success, reverted, or pending)
Returns explorer URL for the hash
Does not require wallet creation or token transfer steps
Does not require radius-wallet-py or radius-wallet-ts
success_criteria: Receipt lookup is performed from tx hash
Result is not guessed without receipt evidence
Explorer link is returned in correct testnet format
Output is simple and understandable for non-blockchain users
No mandatory Radius wallet wrapper dependency appears
